values: no: institutions are absent or pure backdrop

full.name: SOC_STR_003

full.value: none: no community or group beyond 1–2 characters is shown
full.name: SOC_STR_004__none: no community or group beyond 1–2 characters is shown

full.value: background: a community exists but is mostly atmospheric (gossip, crowds) without driving events
full.name: SOC_STR_004__background: a community exists but is mostly atmospheric (gossip, crowds) without driving events

full.value: active secondary agent: community exerts pressure, offers help, or significantly shapes outcomes
full.name: SOC_STR_004__active secondary agent: community exerts pressure, offers help, or significantly shapes outcomes

full.value: collective protagonist/antagonist: a group's fate or coordinated action is the main narrative focus
full.name: SOC_STR_004__collective protagonist/antagonist: a group's fate or coordinated action is the main narrative focus

values: no: all meaningful ties are within a single social stratum or kind
yes: at least one central relationship bridges clearly marked social boundaries
full.name: SOC_STR_005

full.value: analytic-enumerative: relationships are explicitly labeled or listed (e.g., 'X is Y's mentor and Z's cousin')
full.name: SOC_REL_010__analytic-enumerative: relationships are explicitly labeled or listed (e.g., 'X is Y's mentor and Z's cousin')

full.value: scene-implied: relationships are inferred from scenes and dialogue without explicit listing or labeling
full.name: SOC_REL_010__scene-implied: relationships are inferred from scenes and dialogue without explicit listing or labeling

full.value: mixed: some explicit enumeration coexists with substantial scene-based implicit network building
full.name: SOC_REL_010__mixed: some explicit enumeration coexists with substantial scene-based implicit network building

full.value: legitimizing: authority is largely portrayed as justified, wise, or protective
full.name: SOC_PWR_015__legitimizing: authority is largely portrayed as justified, wise, or protective

full.value: ambivalent/mixed: authority has both protective and harmful aspects; critique and respect coexist
full.name: SOC_PWR_015__ambivalent/mixed: authority has both protective and harmful aspects; critique and respect coexist

full.value: critical: authority is shown as corrupt, unjust, or harmful, with little endorsement
full.name: SOC_PWR_015__critical: authority is shown as corrupt, unjust, or harmful, with little endorsement

full.value: subversive: protagonists consciously work to undermine, escape, or overturn authority structures
full.name: SOC_PWR_015__subversive: protagonists consciously work to undermine, escape, or overturn authority structures

values: no: no clear bridging figure; groups relate directly or not at all
yes: a distinct mediator (translator, negotiator, go-between, anchor, emissary) stands between groups
full.name: SOC_PWR_016

full.value: formation: a new bond is created or strangers become tied
full.name: SOC_DYN_011__formation: a new bond is created or strangers become tied

full.value: strengthening/repair: an existing strained or modest bond deepens or is healed
full.name: SOC_DYN_011__strengthening/repair: an existing strained or modest bond deepens or is healed

full.value: deterioration/betrayal: trust erodes, affection cools, or exploitation emerges
full.name: SOC_DYN_011__deterioration/betrayal: trust erodes, affection cools, or exploitation emerges

full.value: breakup/separation/death: a bond ends decisively through departure, rupture, or death
full.name: SOC_DYN_011__breakup/separation/death: a bond ends decisively through departure, rupture, or death

full.value: stable: the relationship's nature is largely unchanged by the story's end
full.name: SOC_DYN_011__stable: the relationship's nature is largely unchanged by the story's end

full.value: cyclical/on-off: the relationship oscillates between connection and distance without net resolution
full.name: SOC_DYN_011__cyclical/on-off: the relationship oscillates between connection and distance without net resolution

full.value: written or recorded media (letters, emails, case files, legal documents, logs, forum posts)
full.name: SOC_COM_017__written or recorded media (letters, emails, case files, legal documents, logs, forum posts)

full.value: ritual/action/gesture (shared labour, offerings, performances, nonverbal acts)
full.name: SOC_COM_017__ritual/action/gesture (shared labour, offerings, performances, nonverbal acts)

full.value: mediated/technological (phone, video, simulations, AI interfaces, social apps)
full.name: SOC_COM_017__mediated/technological (phone, video, simulations, AI interfaces, social apps)

full.value: internal/imagined (dreams, fantasies, silent addresses to absent or dead others)
full.name: SOC_COM_017__internal/imagined (dreams, fantasies, silent addresses to absent or dead others)

values: no: narration and focalization stay with individuals only
yes: a group perspective or chorus is used to comment on or participate in events

narrative.value: high: protagonists are strongly archetypal and largely follow expected genre patterns
narrative.name: AGENT_TRP_018__high: protagonists are strongly archetypal and largely follow expected genre patterns

values: mixed balance of initiative and reactivity
mostly initiates key actions and decisions
narrative.name: AGENT_ROLE_020

narrative.value: present but background (collectives mentioned but rarely act as unified agents)
narrative.name: AGENT_ID_023__present but background (collectives mentioned but rarely act as unified agents)

narrative.value: foregrounded as major agents influencing or driving events
narrative.name: AGENT_ID_023__foregrounded as major agents influencing or driving events

values: minimal: few close relationships shown (1–2 recurring connections)
moderate: a small but varied set of relationships (3–5 recurring connections)
dense: many distinct recurring relationships across family, peers, institutions (6 or more)

narrative.value: bodily sensations or physiology (e.g., heartbeat, nausea, trembling)
narrative.name: AGENT_EMO_002__bodily sensations or physiology (e.g., heartbeat, nausea, trembling)

narrative.value: metaphorical or environmental imagery reflecting mood
narrative.name: AGENT_EMO_002__metaphorical or environmental imagery reflecting mood

narrative.value: actions and choices as emotional indicators
narrative.name: AGENT_EMO_002__actions and choices as emotional indicators

narrative.value: dialogue content or tone revealing emotion
narrative.name: AGENT_EMO_002__dialogue content or tone revealing emotion

values: no: institutions are absent or pure backdrop
yes: at least one institution/collective is personified as having ties, goals, or conflicts
narrative.name: SOC_STR_003

narrative.value: none: no community or group beyond 1–2 characters is shown
narrative.name: SOC_STR_004__none: no community or group beyond 1–2 characters is shown

narrative.value: background: a community exists but is mostly atmospheric (gossip, crowds) without driving events
narrative.name: SOC_STR_004__background: a community exists but is mostly atmospheric (gossip, crowds) without driving events

narrative.value: active secondary agent: community exerts pressure, offers help, or significantly shapes outcomes
narrative.name: SOC_STR_004__active secondary agent: community exerts pressure, offers help, or significantly shapes outcomes

narrative.value: collective protagonist/antagonist: a group's fate or coordinated action is the main narrative focus
narrative.name: SOC_STR_004__collective protagonist/antagonist: a group's fate or coordinated action is the main narrative focus

values: no: all meaningful ties are within a single social stratum or kind
yes: at least one central relationship bridges clearly marked social boundaries
narrative.name: SOC_STR_005

narrative.value: analytic-enumerative: relationships are explicitly labeled or listed (e.g., 'X is Y's mentor and Z's cousin')
narrative.name: SOC_REL_010__analytic-enumerative: relationships are explicitly labeled or listed (e.g., 'X is Y's mentor and Z's cousin')

narrative.value: scene-implied: relationships are inferred from scenes and dialogue without explicit listing or labeling
narrative.name: SOC_REL_010__scene-implied: relationships are inferred from scenes and dialogue without explicit listing or labeling

narrative.value: mixed: some explicit enumeration coexists with substantial scene-based implicit network building
narrative.name: SOC_REL_010__mixed: some explicit enumeration coexists with substantial scene-based implicit network building

narrative.value: legitimizing: authority is largely portrayed as justified, wise, or protective
narrative.name: SOC_PWR_015__legitimizing: authority is largely portrayed as justified, wise, or protective

narrative.value: ambivalent/mixed: authority has both protective and harmful aspects; critique and respect coexist
narrative.name: SOC_PWR_015__ambivalent/mixed: authority has both protective and harmful aspects; critique and respect coexist

narrative.value: critical: authority is shown as corrupt, unjust, or harmful, with little endorsement
narrative.name: SOC_PWR_015__critical: authority is shown as corrupt, unjust, or harmful, with little endorsement

narrative.value: subversive: protagonists consciously work to undermine, escape, or overturn authority structures
narrative.name: SOC_PWR_015__subversive: protagonists consciously work to undermine, escape, or overturn authority structures

values: no: no clear bridging figure; groups relate directly or not at all
yes: a distinct mediator (translator, negotiator, go-between, anchor, emissary) stands between groups
narrative.name: SOC_PWR_016

narrative.value: formation: a new bond is created or strangers become tied
narrative.name: SOC_DYN_011__formation: a new bond is created or strangers become tied

narrative.value: strengthening/repair: an existing strained or modest bond deepens or is healed
narrative.name: SOC_DYN_011__strengthening/repair: an existing strained or modest bond deepens or is healed

narrative.value: deterioration/betrayal: trust erodes, affection cools, or exploitation emerges
narrative.name: SOC_DYN_011__deterioration/betrayal: trust erodes, affection cools, or exploitation emerges

narrative.value: breakup/separation/death: a bond ends decisively through departure, rupture, or death
narrative.name: SOC_DYN_011__breakup/separation/death: a bond ends decisively through departure, rupture, or death

narrative.value: stable: the relationship's nature is largely unchanged by the story's end
narrative.name: SOC_DYN_011__stable: the relationship's nature is largely unchanged by the story's end

narrative.value: cyclical/on-off: the relationship oscillates between connection and distance without net resolution
narrative.name: SOC_DYN_011__cyclical/on-off: the relationship oscillates between connection and distance without net resolution

narrative.value: written or recorded media (letters, emails, case files, legal documents, logs, forum posts)
narrative.name: SOC_COM_017__written or recorded media (letters, emails, case files, legal documents, logs, forum posts)

narrative.value: ritual/action/gesture (shared labour, offerings, performances, nonverbal acts)
narrative.name: SOC_COM_017__ritual/action/gesture (shared labour, offerings, performances, nonverbal acts)

narrative.value: mediated/technological (phone, video, simulations, AI interfaces, social apps)
narrative.name: SOC_COM_017__mediated/technological (phone, video, simulations, AI interfaces, social apps)

narrative.value: internal/imagined (dreams, fantasies, silent addresses to absent or dead others)
narrative.name: SOC_COM_017__internal/imagined (dreams, fantasies, silent addresses to absent or dead others)

values: no: narration and focalization stay with individuals only
yes: a group perspective or chorus is used to comment on or participate in events
narrative.name: SOC_COM_018
